entry.title: Bank balances are not triggering into CFA
entry.content:
Hi 

After receiving statements from the bank, the balances are not triggering into CFA, could anyone help me on this.

Thanks,

Sai charan

entry.title: How to use RFOPENPOSTING_FR for FEC report if for the France we use FAGL_IT_02 program?
entry.content:
Hi,

One question, for FEC France report it's necessary to run a carryforward report  RFOPENPOSTING_FR.

But for France we already use the FI closing report FAGL_IT_02 which provides access to FAGL_YEC_POSTINGS_EHP4 Italy / Closing/Opening Postings at Year End. 

Will there be any conflicts?

thank you

entry.title: ich möchte das Geschäftsjahr ändern. Aktuell Kalenderjahr und ab 01.10.2024.
entry.content: Ich habe das Geschäftsjahr gleich Kalenderjahr. Müll auch im Jahr 2024. Ab dem 01.10 soll ich ein neues Geschäftsjahr vom 01.10. bis zum 30.09 einrichten mit einem Rumpfgeschäftsjahr von 01.01.-30.09.24. Geht das überhaupt. Ich habe mal versucht, das im Customizing einzustellen, mit Rumpf für 2024 und 9 Perioden. Kann ich nicht speichern. Kommt immer ein Fehler. Kann mir jemand einen Tipp geben

entry.title: Error glt2201 when posting between customer/vendor
entry.content: I am trying to clear a customer and offsetting the difference to a Supplier account, the system is throwing the error Error glt2201 when posting between customer/vendor

entry.title: How to rename custom analytical application created via View-Browser
entry.content:
Hello how can an analytical application, which was created via custom analytical query and the App View-Browser, be renamed? It doesn't show the given description but the technical name of the query. How can the highlighted name be changed?
Thanks and best regards

entry.title: Payment rounding in F110
entry.content:
Hello, 

As per the ask from bank, we need to send the payment amount in rounded value or else it will be rejected in bank. 

For example: Amount 200.03 should be rounded to 200.00 or 200.05, it should be in the multiples of 0.05. I have maintained OB90 with value 5, even though payment amount is not getting rounded while running F110. 

Can you please let me know the option, that how can we achieve it in F110. 

Thanks, 

Mouli

entry.title: Change Posting Date (AFAB) - FAA_DEPRECIATION_POST
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues

Please your support with this issue:

When we run the depreciation Posting Run (AFAB), the AF document is created with date at the end of the month, even in months where the last day is a non-working day.

We need to adjust this behavior to ensure that the document's posting date is the last working day of the month.

For example, in June 2024, the depreciation document had a posting date of 30.06.2024 in the system.

But the correct posting date for us, is 28.06.2024 (the last working day of June).

Is there a way to make this adjustment?

Thanks for your support.

Regards

Karen

entry.title: Change currency in SAP S/4HANA report S_ALR_87013019
entry.content:
In SAP S 4HANA report S_ALR_87013019 how to change the currency for object value?
Currently it is only bringing ACC currency

entry.title: Error 00309 SM35
entry.content:
Hello.
During the processing of a file via SM35 there was a system failure leaving the status of in processing, it is necessary to complete the processing completely as only part of the items were registered. When trying to reprocess, message 00309 is returned. 
Best Regards 
Nadir

entry.title: How to Clear Customer GL Reconcilation Balance
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Customer GL Reconcilation Balance 2642411 has negative balances of 30.27 and the user wants the balance to be made NIL or Zero.  We are in ECC 6.0

I have read that using customer invoice or credit memo, the balance can be transfered to Normal GL Account.

Please explain in details how to implement this solution or any other solution will be appreciated.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: No measurement unit is assigned to ISO code SPACE while interface to SAP
entry.content:
Dears,

We are facing the error message -No measurement unit is assigned to ISO code SPACE

Issue occurs with Purchase order Unit price and PO price unit difference scenarios.

Interface system is not able to send response to SAP for further Parking Invoice and IR invoice. 

Appreciate if anyone can share the feedback on the issue faced earlier.

Best Regards,

Awneesh

entry.title: S4 1909 on premises -Down payment request via workflow process
entry.content:
Dears,

In S/4HANA 1909 on-premises, is there a way to create a similar workflow approval for handling down payment requests?

We want to improve efficiency, traceability, and compliance by automating this process.

 

Could you please guide us on how to:

  1. Create a similar transaction in our on-premise system?
  2. Set up an approval workflow for down payment requests?

 

Best Regards,

Awneesh

entry.title: Hardware Key Error
entry.content: I have a error in SUM, SAP don't take the Hardware Key

entry.title: Automatic Rounding Difference Posting to GL Account in FB60 via Posting through VIM
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently posting vendor invoices to the SAP system via VIM, which is designed to eliminate the need for manual intervention. However, we’ve encountered an issue with the tax calculation. The transaction code being used is FB60, and there is a small discrepancy between the tax amount calculated by the system and the tax amount stated on the invoice.

I would like to route this difference to a specific GL account so that the posting can occur automatically. However, I have been unable to find the appropriate configuration to set this up.

entry.title: reversion of fixed assets already depreciated
entry.content:
Good morning, dear friends,

I have a problem with some fixed assets that have already fulfilled their useful life, they are already depreciated but the system is generating the reversal of all the depreciation, in addition to that I have an asset that is depreciated and has not yet fulfilled its useful life but when a period is accounted for the following period it reverses it.

What can I do?

entry.title: is it possible to use one step in many substitutions in GGB1?
entry.content:
hi guys,

i have created one new substitution-step for one company code under Financial Accounting -> Line Item level. 

As we have many company codes using different types of line item substitution folders, they would now want to have the same step in all of the company codes. 

Is there any easy way to achieve this other than copy that 'step' one by one into all the substitution folders? Or is there any user exit that i can use?

Thanks
LC

SAP S/4HANA Finance FIN (Finance)

entry.title: Preassignment of tax categories in customer output tax is not working in migration cockpit
entry.content:
When a customer BP is created and extended to a sales org, output tax table entries are added automatically. Once the tax categories are determined automatically, user has to just enter value for tax classification. 

While extending a customer through migration cockpit, this functionality is not working. 

How can user update this without having to manually add each tax category as there will be thousands of entries with bulk uploads?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BKPF-XBLNR (Reference Field is not changeable)
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a existing config, to allows change of field BKPF-XBLNR.

When I enter the document manually F-02, I am able to change the BKPF-XBLNR after the document is posted

We have a case, where accounting doc is posted via Purchase Order and due to some reason we want to change the BKPF-XBLNR field, and system is not allowing to change. Is this happening because the accounting doc is posted via Purchase Order? If we want to change these kinds of document is there any other way?

entry.title: Create new data provider for Funds Management Reconciliation
entry.content:
I'm building a Reconciliation Rule (FMFGRCN_DEF_RULE) for Funds Management. 

However, the listed providers for Data Slices do not have Profit Centre as a field for data selection.

Is it possible to add a field in a existing data provider? If not, how do I create a new data provider?

entry.title: Delete Park Doc
entry.content:
Trying to delete Park doc by using FBV0 but found it still exist due to archived doc in the park doc.

How can we delete park doc if there is an archived doc there
